# [clang] crash on immediate-invoked consteval lambda used as argument

**Author:** k-arrows
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/185270
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, confirmed, c++23, generated by fuzzer, regression:21
**Closed Date:** 2026-03-10T13:18:25Z

## Body

Reproducer:
https://godbolt.org/z/f6Maf7Eor
```cpp
void foo()([] consteval -> int {}())
```

Backtrace:
```console
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:572: decltype(auto) llvm::cast(From*) [with To = clang::VarDecl; From = clang::Decl]: Assertion `isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```
